query: ("cool roof" OR "green roof" OR "living roof" OR "vegetative roof" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "albedo roof" OR "high albedo" OR "solar reflective" OR "building retrofit" OR "urban planning intervention" OR "cool pavement" OR "reflective material") AND ("temperature reduction" OR "urban heat island" OR "thermal comfort" OR "heat exposure" OR "temperature-health" OR "heat-health" OR "climate adaptation" OR "heat mitigation" OR "cooling effect" OR "ambient temperature" OR "surface temperature") AND (mortality OR morbidity OR hospitalization OR "emergency department" OR "emergency room" OR cardiovascular OR respiratory OR "heat stress" OR "heat illness" OR "heat-related" OR "public health" OR "health outcome" OR "adverse health" OR "health effect") AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "causal inference" OR "intervention study" OR "policy evaluation" OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR "longitudinal" OR "cohort" OR "case-control" OR "cross-sectional" OR evaluation OR impact OR causal OR "comparative study" OR epidemiological)
